stop_model: stop = 1.5x the 10-day ATR below the trigger, clamped 4-12% of price
disclaimer: Educational content only, not investment advice. A live, forward-only record of the site's own published calls -- nothing backfilled. Each call is graded by whether price hit +1R before the stop within 10 trading days.

hindsight.note: Live forward record only. A bucket's hit-rate appears once it has >=5 resolved calls. Diagnostic check on whether our conviction score predicts follow-through -- not (yet) fed back into it.
